name: Tab Aging
description: Idle-tab urgency: optional title emoji by how long since you last used each tab. MV3, local-only.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src-elem https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com;
